---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.
This webpage covers the NY winter malting barely project data analysis. 


1. PRE PROCESSING AND QC

[Quality control and merging datasets](1.-Multi_spec_processingQC.html)

[Raw Sepctral data QC and Spatial Correlation Plots ](Spectral_data_plots.html)

[Raw Agronomic Data QC and Spatial Correlation Plot]("Agronomic_data_plots.html")
